text.title: This is The Women Who Made Us
text.intro: A live music and storytelling universe about the women who shaped us. The artists, the icons, the voices that raised us, and the stories that stayed with us. Each project within this universe explores how women in culture, art, and music have shaped who we are today. This space is the beginning. If you are here, you are early.
text.ctaTitle: A theatrical Experience Worth Waiting For
text.ctaDescription: Subscribe to receive updates, early access, and invitations.
text.legalText: The Women Who Made Us™. All Rights Reserved. A Planni Entertainment Production By Sandra Salcedo Lacouture. Trademark registered
text.privacyText: By subscribing to Women Who Made Us, you agree that we may use your information to send you editorial content related to the project. Your data is stored securely, never sold, and you may unsubscribe at any time. By continuing, you agree to our Privacy Policy.
text.termsText: By using this site, you agree to the Terms and Conditions of Women Who Made Us. The content is provided for informational purposes, is protected by copyright, and may be modified without prior notice.
